entries.definition: A movable joint or mechanism on which a door, lid, or other attached part swings; a point or factor on which something depends or turns.
entries.exampleSentence: The old door hung from a rusty hinge.

entries.definition: To attach or fasten with a hinge; (figuratively) to depend or turn on a key factor or issue.
entries.exampleSentence: The committee's decision hinges on the final budget report.
